TimeControlsStep1.title: Time controls
TimeControlsStep1.description:
If your crew are taking too long, you can speed up the game.

Do that now by [color=LIGHT_GREEN]clicking[/color] on the highlighted [color=PURPLE]5x speed[/color] button or pressing the {speed_fastest} key.

Pressing {speed_normal} or {speed_fast} will also change speeds.
